Recent papers

Recent papers on the abc conjecture, surfaced by the prominence of their authors in this directory.

Showing 11 papers, ranked by the Top 100 standing of their authors then by recency. Authors who appear in the Top 100 are shown in bold.

#TitleAuthorsPublishedBest rank
1Towards Lang--Vojta via DegenerationRyan C. Chen, Natalia Garcia-Fritz, Siddharth Mathur, Hector Pasten2026-02#9
2Sobre los teoremas de Shafarevich y SiegelHector Pasten2026-01#9
3Quadratic points on double planesNathan Chen, Ben Church, Hector Pasten, Isabel Vogt2025-11#9
4Arithmetic progressions in sumsets of geometric progressionsMichael A. Bennett2025-12#28
5Belyi map verification using certified path trackingAlexandre Guillemot, John Voight2026-04#35
6Preperiodic integers for $x^d+c$ in large degreeJohn R. Doyle, Wade Hindes2025-10#43
7On the factorization of iterates of $x^d+c$ in large degreeWade Hindes2025-08#43
8On higher dimensional integrality and multiplicative dependence in semigroup algebraic dynamicsJorge Mello, Yu Yasufuku2026-04#75
9Gain Bounds for Diagonal Superelliptic Equations under the Strong ABC ConjectureKarsten Müller2026-02#92
10From ABC to Effective Roth and Ridout Constants for Cubic RootsKarsten Müller, Michael Taktikos2026-01#92
11The Skolem Problem in rings of positive characteristicRuiwen Dong, Doron Shafrir2025-10#98
